generated_oml:
instance BuildingControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors and controllers within Building Control System providing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSRealTimeData
]

instance BCSRealTimeData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSystemSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSRealTimeData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched semantic model representing sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering enabler for transforming enriched BIM models into structured DT artifacts with modular architecture and standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management to enhance operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for anticipating infrastructure issues and reducing costs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for scenario analysis and optimization of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationResult
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for resource allocation and energy efficiency improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResourceOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for AECO stakeholders to improve collaboration and lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:provides InformedDecisionRecommendation
]

instance OperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for operational oversight"
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on potential equipment failures"
]

instance PerformanceSimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes of building performance under various scenarios"
]

instance ResourceOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing resource usage and reducing costs"
]

instance InformedDecisionRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for informed decision-making in building management"
]

instance AECOBuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure with complex heterogeneous components requiring lifecycle management from design to operation"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle stages include initial device modeling within BIM environments to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts; real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital twins; interactive visualization interfaces for monitoring and control; and modular integration of custom services to support operational evolution and adaptation to changing requirements."
]
